languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}Губернатор Дунавски{/d}, по последним данным, удерживает позиции на востоке, у главных врат. Говорят, что дерется так, будто Погонщица ей прямо на ухо кричит".

"{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}Governor Dunawski{/d}, according to the latest reports, is holding ground to the east, at the main gate. They say she's fighting as if the Drover itself is screaming right in her ear."
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}Губернатор Дунавски{/d}, по последним данным, удерживает позиции на востоке, у главных врат. Говорят, что дерется так, будто Погонщица ей прямо на ухо кричит".

traits.locale_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}Governor Dunawski{/d}, according to the latest reports, is holding ground to the east, at the main gate. They say she's fighting as if the Drover itself is screaming right in her ear."
"Governor Dunawski, according to the latest reports, is holding ground to the east, at the main gate. They say she's fighting as if the Drover itself is screaming right in her ear."
"Castellan-Governor Dunawski, according to the latest reports, is holding ground to the east, at the main gate. And she's fighting like she's possessed by Saint Macharius himself."
"Governor Dunawski, according to the latest reports, is holding ground to the east, at the main gate. They say she's fighting as if the Drover is screaming right into her ear."
"Governor Dunawski, according to the latest reports, is holding ground to the east, at the main gate. They say she's fighting as if the Drover itself is screaming right in her ear."

languages.text: 「城代・ドナウスキは最新報告によると、東のメインゲートを守り続けている。聖マカリウス自身に取り憑かれたかのように戦っている」
languages.original_text: "Castellan-Governor Dunawski, according to the latest reports, is holding ground to the east, at the main gate. And she's fighting like she's possessed by Saint Macharius himself."

traits.locale_text: 「城代・ドナウスキは最新報告によると、東のメインゲートを守り続けている。聖マカリウス自身に取り憑かれたかのように戦っている」

languages.text: «La {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}gobernadora Dunawski{/d}, según los últimos informes, resiste en el este, junto a la puerta principal. Lucha como si el Pastor le estuviera gritando al oído, según dicen».
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}Governor Dunawski{/d}, according to the latest reports, is holding ground to the east, at the main gate. They say she's fighting as if the Drover itself is screaming right in her ear."

traits.locale_text: «La {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}gobernadora Dunawski{/d}, según los últimos informes, resiste en el este, junto a la puerta principal. Lucha como si el Pastor le estuviera gritando al oído, según dicen».

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}Gouverneurin Dunawski{/d} hält den neuesten Berichten zufolge am Haupttor im Osten die Stellung. Angeblich kämpft sie, als würde ihr der Treiber selbst direkt ins Ohr brüllen."
languages.original_text: "Governor Dunawski, according to the latest reports, is holding ground to the east, at the main gate. They say she's fighting as if the Drover itself is screaming right in her ear."

traits.locale_text: "Gouverneurin Dunawski hält den neuesten Berichten zufolge am Haupttor im Osten die Stellung. Angeblich kämpft sie, als würde ihr der Treiber selbst direkt ins Ohr brüllen."

languages.text: « D'après les derniers rapports, la {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}gouverneure Dunawski{/d} parvient à maintenir l'ennemi en respect à l'est, au niveau de la porte principale. Apparemment, elle se bat aussi furieusement que si le Chasseur lui-même lui criait à l'oreille. »
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}Governor Dunawski{/d}, according to the latest reports, is holding ground to the east, at the main gate. They say she's fighting as if the Drover itself is screaming right in her ear."

traits.locale_text: « D'après les derniers rapports, la {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}gouverneure Dunawski{/d} parvient à maintenir l'ennemi en respect à l'est, au niveau de la porte principale. Apparemment, elle se bat aussi furieusement que si le Chasseur lui-même lui criait à l'oreille. »

languages.text: “根据最新报告，{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}杜纳芙斯卡总督{/d}正在东侧主门坚守阵地。他们说她厮杀起来的模样，就像有拒生花在她耳边尖啸一般。”
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}Governor Dunawski{/d}, according to the latest reports, is holding ground to the east, at the main gate. They say she's fighting as if the Drover itself is screaming right in her ear."

traits.locale_text: “根据最新报告，{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}杜纳芙斯卡总督{/d}正在东侧主门坚守阵地。他们说她厮杀起来的模样，就像有拒生花在她耳边尖啸一般。”

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}Vali Dunawski{/d}, son raporlara göre doğu tarafındaki ana kapı mevzisini koruyor. Çoban'ın sesi kafasında yankılanıyormuş gibi savaştığını söylüyorlar."
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}Governor Dunawski{/d}, according to the latest reports, is holding ground to the east, at the main gate. They say she's fighting as if the Drover itself is screaming right in her ear."

traits.locale_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}Vali Dunawski{/d}, son raporlara göre doğu tarafındaki ana kapı mevzisini koruyor. Çoban'ın sesi kafasında yankılanıyormuş gibi savaştığını söylüyorlar."
